choice-band.name: Choice Band
choice-band.effect: Boosts the holder's Attack by 50%, but restricts it to using only the first move selected.

choice-scarf.name: Choice Scarf
choice-scarf.effect: Boosts the holder's Speed by 50%, but restricts it to using only the first move selected.

choice-specs.name: Choice Specs
choice-specs.effect: Boosts the holder's Sp. Atk by 50%, but restricts it to using only the first move selected.

life-orb.name: Life Orb
life-orb.effect: Boosts the power of the holder's moves by 30%. After each attack, the holder loses 1/10 of its max HP.

leftovers.name: Leftovers
leftovers.effect: The holder restores 1/16 of its max HP each turn.

rocky-helmet.name: Rocky Helmet
rocky-helmet.effect: If the holder is hit by a contact move, the attacker takes 1/6 of its max HP in damage.

eviolite.name: Eviolite
eviolite.effect: Boosts the Defense and Sp. Defense of a Pokémon that has not yet reached its final form by 50%.

focus-sash.name: Focus Sash
focus-sash.effect: If the holder has full HP, it will survive a hit that would KO it with 1 HP. Consumed after use.

assault-vest.name: Assault Vest
assault-vest.effect: Boosts the holder's Sp. Defense by 50%, but restricts it to using only attacking moves.

expert-belt.name: Expert Belt
expert-belt.effect: Boosts the power of supereffective moves by 20%.

wide-lens.name: Wide Lens
wide-lens.effect: Boosts the accuracy of the holder's moves by 10%.

zoom-lens.name: Zoom Lens
zoom-lens.effect: Boosts the accuracy of the holder's moves by 20% if the holder moves after the target.

air-balloon.name: Air Balloon
air-balloon.effect: The holder floats in the air and is immune to Ground-type moves. Popped if hit by any move.

heavy-duty-boots.name: Heavy-Duty Boots
heavy-duty-boots.effect: The holder is not affected by hazards on the field (Stealth Rock, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, etc.).

booster-energy.name: Booster Energy
booster-energy.effect: Activates the Quark Drive or Protosynthesis Ability for the holder if neither sun nor electric terrain is active. Consumed after use.
